title: Sanji Is Trapped by the Wedding
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Pedro, Pudding as Luffy and Nami are captured while Sanji is pushed deeper into the wedding trap.
scene: The rescue mission collapses into captivity and emotional pressure as Sanji is forced closer to the arranged wedding.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...then how's this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I can't die here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "The dawn of this world" is near! I must return to my country!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Mamamama, I'm loving that spirit of yours! I've decided to let you off the hook with just 50 years.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Go on... Live!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: LEGG BENEDICT!

dialogue.speaker: Pedro
dialogue.text: Answer Me-Bon, Pedro!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Why did you ever return?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why would you ever return to the hellish land where you lost your part- her and so whole years of your precious life?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Cough! The straw hat pirates... are saviors of my precious hometown!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Judging from this, I truly believe that they are the people who will cause the world to transition into its "dawn"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those people... Will one day, surpass even the likes of us... and change this world!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: With thoughts like this in mind, I don't feel the least bit of regret for throwing away the remainder of my life like this.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't get me wrong though. I definitely don't plan on dying IN THIS SPOT!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: until the straw hats manage to achieve their goals on this island...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I have no intention of dying here!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: in front of pudding's room.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Come on!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: No, Idiot! :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Lady pudding is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: B.U.S.Y. RIGHT NOW! :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'll only take me a second to hand her a gift!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No, you idiot! :) I won't let you open me up! Now, go away! :)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...If I remember correctly, pudding's room had a balcony.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Aha!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll just hand her this stuff through the window.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...but maybe it'd be a bit rude for me to... y'know... intrude on her privacy and all.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I mean, we are get- ting married tomorrow...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I'd say it'd be acceptable even if I ended up witnessing her in the middle of changing... or even just completely n- naked! :)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Pitter Patter...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: UFUFFU!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Woah, that's fantastic! Seems like she's in enough of a good mood to laugh!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: There she is... my adorable little pudding!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: AHaha- haha...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hm? Who's she talking with?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Reju! Why is she here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: WHAT'S GOING O-...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Ahaha- Ha... how funny!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Captured Crew storyline with 38 dialogue beats. Luffy and Nami are imprisoned, while Sanji is cornered by family obligation and Big Mom’s wedding plans.
